title: trifolium repens subsp. macrorrhizum
intro: Trifolium repens subsp. macrorrhizum, a subspecies of white clover, is a perennial plant characterized by its spreading habit and underground stolons. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which help in the treatment of various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Trifolium repens subsp. macrorrhizum are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
